reviews.comment:
La NAFTA es la más barata del lugar considerando la calidad, el servicio de los playeros es normal. Lo que hace la diferencia es el shop, excelente la comida , precios dentro de todo accesibles!

(Translated by Google)
NAFTA is the cheapest gas station in town considering the quality, and the service from the attendants is average. What makes it stand out is the shop; the food is excellent, and the prices are reasonably priced!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNbGYzUXV3RRAB
